name: Optoelectronics Co.,Ltd.
summary: Optoelectronics Co.,Ltd. develops, manufactures, and sells automatic recognition devices in Japan and internationally. It offers 2D imagers and 1D laser/CCD module engines, handy scanners, data collectors, handy terminals, and desktop/embedded and stationary scanners. The company was founded in 1976 and is headquartered in Warabi, Japan.
